mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.ip AS "ip", a.ipcity AS "ipcity", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.eqno AS "eqno", a.qrcode AS "qrcode", a.status AS "status", a.fail_remark AS "failRemark",
u.phone AS "u.phone", u.acount AS "u.acount", u.idno AS "u.idno", u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.lianghao AS "u.lianghao"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_login_log( id, uid, ip, ipcity, create_date, eqno, qrcode, status, fail_remark ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{ip}, #{ipcity}, #{createDate}, #{eqno}, #{qrcode}, #{status}, #{failRemark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_login_log SET uid = #{u.id}, ip = #{ip}, ipcity = #{ipcity}, eqno = #{eqno}, qrcode = #{qrcode}, status = #{status}, fail_remark = #{failRemark} WHERE id = #{id}
